hero.title: Where every smile is born with a touch of magic
hero.subtitle: Pediatric dentistry with enchantment in Triângulo Mineiro, Brazil. Dr. Bianca turns the fear of the dentist into a magical adventure for your child.

impact.phrase: Because your child's first dentist doesn't have to be scary

about.title: The Tooth Fairy's story
about.description: I'm Dr. Bianca Ribas Samartin, the Tooth Fairy. I graduated in Dentistry from Universidade de Uberaba (UNIUBE) and chose Pediatric Dentistry because I believe a child's first visit to the dentist can be magical. Here, every child is welcomed into a playful and warm environment, where the dental office becomes an enchanted world.
about.description2: My mission is to care for your child's smile with warmth, expertise, and a whole lot of magic — so they grow up loving to take care of their teeth.

services.title: The spells
services.subtitle: Every smile deserves special care

firstVisit.name: First Magical Visit
firstVisit.description: The first encounter with the Tooth Fairy: getting acquainted, exploring the enchanted office, and building trust with your child.

prevention.name: Enchanted Prevention
prevention.description: Fluoride application, sealants, and oral hygiene guidance delivered in a playful and fun way that kids absolutely love.

treatment.name: Gentle Treatments
treatment.description: Restorations, cavity treatment, and dental development monitoring, always with gentle and welcoming techniques.

emergency.name: Dental Emergencies
emergency.description: Trauma, pain, and pediatric dental emergencies with humanized and prompt care to comfort both parents and children.

services.cta: Find out which magic your child's smile needs

playful.name: Playful Environment
playful.description: An office decorated like an enchanted world, where every child feels safe and at ease.

fearless.name: Fear-Free
fearless.description: Behavioral management techniques that transform the visit into a positive and fun experience.

specialized.name: Child Specialist
specialized.description: Specialized training in Pediatric Dentistry — technical and emotional care tailored to every age group.

location.name: Triângulo Mineiro
location.description: Conveniently located in the Triângulo Mineiro region, with easy access and parking.

cro.name: CRO MG 63888
cro.description: Active professional registration with the Minas Gerais Regional Dental Council.

humanized.name: Humanized Care
humanized.description: Every family receives personalized attention, from the first contact to ongoing follow-up.

testimonials.title: What mothers say

t1.text: My daughter used to be terrified of dentists and now she asks to go back! Dr. Bianca is amazing with children.
t1.author: Camila R.

t2.text: The office is enchanting, like a make-believe world. My son loves going to his appointments.
t2.author: Fernanda M.

t3.text: A dedicated and super attentive professional. She explains everything calmly and the kids truly trust her.
t3.author: Juliana S.

t4.text: The Tooth Fairy transformed the dental experience for our entire family. I recommend her wholeheartedly!
t4.author: Patrícia L.

t5.text: I took my baby for the first appointment and Dr. Bianca was wonderful. Perfect environment for children.
t5.author: Amanda C.

t6.text: After several attempts with other dentists, we finally found the right professional. Impeccable care.
t6.author: Renata B.

testimonials.cta: Your family also deserves this kind of care

contact.title: And they smiled happily ever after
contact.subtitle: Shall we write this story together?
